reviews.comment:
Me encanta esta estación de servicio, buena atención, cuenta a sus costados con lugar para estacionar, mesas, y bancos.
Si venis cansado y necesitas un tiempo para dormir, más que recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
I love this gas station; the service is great, and it has parking, tables, and benches on either side.
If you're tired and need a place to sleep, I highly recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNENmJiajN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños hombres muy sucio . Gaseosas, sándwich miga caros y puro pan galletitas lo mismo, pero el local bastante bien.

(Translated by Google)
The men's restrooms were very dirty. The sodas and sandwiches were expensive, and the bread and crackers were just as bad, but the place itself was quite nice.
